CREATE DATABASE test_db1 COMMENT 'Initial comment';
ALTER DATABASE test_db1 MODIFY COMMENT 'Updated comment for test_db1';
SHOW CREATE DATABASE test_db1;
CREATE DATABASE test_db2 COMMENT 'Another comment';
ALTER DATABASE test_db2 MODIFY COMMENT '';
SHOW CREATE DATABASE test_db2;
CREATE DATABASE test_db3;
ALTER DATABASE test_db3 MODIFY COMMENT 'Comment for db3';
ALTER DATABASE test_db3 MODIFY COMMENT 'Another modification of comment for db3';
SELECT database, comment FROM system.databases WHERE database = 'test_db3';
CREATE DATABASE test_db4 COMMENT 'Comment here';
ALTER DATABASE test_db4 MODIFY COMMENT NULL;
SHOW CREATE DATABASE test_db4;
CREATE DATABASE main_db COMMENT 'Main database comment';
ALTER DATABASE main_db MODIFY COMMENT 'Another comment for main_db';
CREATE DATABASE complex_db COMMENT 'This database will have a complex schema';
ALTER DATABASE complex_db MODIFY COMMENT 'Complex example updating comment';
CREATE DATABASE nested_db COMMENT 'Nested database comment';
ALTER DATABASE nested_db MODIFY COMMENT 'Updated comment';
SHOW CREATE DATABASE nested_db;
CREATE DATABASE example_db;
ALTER DATABASE example_db MODIFY COMMENT 'Initial comment for example_db';
ALTER DATABASE example_db MODIFY COMMENT 'Another comment for example_db';
CREATE DATABASE test_comment_change;
ALTER DATABASE test_comment_change MODIFY COMMENT 'Changing comment';
SHOW CREATE DATABASE test_comment_change;
